query: SELECT tm.name, COUNT(*) as transactions, SUM(xp.amount) as total_xp FROM xp_transactions xp JOIN team_members tm ON xp.teamMemberId = tm.id GROUP BY tm.name ORDER BY total_xp DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT tm.name, COUNT(*) as transactions, SUM(xp.amount) as total_xp FROM xp_transactions xp JOIN team_members tm ON xp.teamMemberId = tm.id GROUP BY tm.name ORDER BY total_xp DESC;
